basic_details.job_title: IN SPACe Young Professional Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for 10 Posts
basic_details.organization_name: Indian National Space Promotion and Authorization Centre (IN SPACe)

age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: 30 years. Age relaxation rules will be as per government norms.

qualification.education_qualification: Post Graduate Degree, Engineering Degree (BE/B.Tech.), Master's Degree, LLM
qualification.details: Young Professional (Grade-1/Grade-2) - Technical Directorate (Downstream): Post Graduate Degree in Science/Engineering stream. Young Professional (Grade-1/Grade-2) - Technical Directorate (Upstream): Engineering Degree (BE/B.Tech.) in Electronics/Mechanical/Electronics and Communication/Aerospace/Computer Science streams. Young Professional (Grade-1/Grade-2) - Promotion Directorate (International Outreach): Master's Degree in Public Policy, International Relations or an MBA with a focus on International Business. Young Professional (Grade-1/Grade-2) - Promotion Directorate (Academia Outreach): Engineering Degree (B. Tech/M. Tech.) in Aerospace, Electronics or Mechanical Engineering. Young Professional (Grade-1/Grade-2) - PMA Directorate (Program Management): B.E./B. Tech or equivalent (Electronics & Communication/Mechanical/Electrical/Computer Science/Data Science/Aerospace Engineering or other allied branches). Young Professional (Grade-1/Grade-2) - PMA Directorate (Authorization Directorate): BE/B. Tech or equivalent (Electronics & Communication/Mechanical/Electrical/Computer Science/Data Science/Aerospace Engineering or other allied branches). Young Professional (Grade-1/Grade-2) - Decadal Vision Implementation (A): Graduation with Engineering/Science/Economics stream 3/4-year full time course. Young Professional (Grade-1/Grade-2) - Decadal Vision Implementation (B): Post Graduation (2-year full time course) from a recognized University/Institute with graduation in Engineering/Science/Economics. Young Professional (Grade-1/Grade-2) - Legal Directorate: Master's Degree in Law (LLM) from a recognized university.

salary_details.details: Selected candidates will receive a monthly salary ranging from Rs. 70,000 to Rs. 90,000.

how_to_apply: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the IN SPACe Various Posts Recruitment 2026.
Applications must be submitted online on or before 20-06-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of IN SPACe to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the IN SPACe Young Professional recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your online application for the IN SPACe Young Professional posts is 20th June 2026. Ensure you apply well in advance to avoid any last-minute technical issues.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available for Young Professionals at IN SPACe?
faq.answer: There are a total of 10 vacancies for the Young Professional (Grade-1/Grade-2) positions announced by IN SPACe in this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q3. What is the educational qualification required for these posts?
faq.answer: The eligibility criteria vary by specialization. Qualifications range from Post Graduate Degrees in Science/Engineering, Engineering Degrees (BE/B.Tech.), Master's Degrees in Public Policy/International Relations/MBA, to a Master's Degree in Law (LLM).

faq.question: Q4. What is the age limit for the Young Professional posts?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for all Young Professional posts is 30 years. Specific age relaxation rules might apply as per government guidelines.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary offered for the Young Professional positions?
faq.answer: Selected candidates will receive a competitive monthly salary in the range of Rs. 70,000 to Rs. 90,000 per month.

faq.question: Q6. Is there any application fee for IN SPACe recruitment?
faq.answer: No, the official notification indicates that there is no application fee for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for IN SPACe Young Professional recruitment?
faq.answer: The selection process primarily involves the scrutiny of applications received, followed by an interview for shortlisted candidates.

faq.question: Q8. What is the nature of the job?
faq.answer: The positions of Young Professional (Grade-1/Grade-2) at IN SPACe are contractual in nature.

faq.question: Q9. Where can I find the official notification for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The official notification PDF can be accessed through the 'Important Links' section of this article. It is highly recommended to read it thoroughly before applying.

faq.question: Q10. Is this recruitment for a specific location?
faq.answer: The organization is based in Gujarat, and the recruitment is for positions within IN SPACe. Specific posting details might be available in the official notification.
